invalid_issue_start_date.title: Unable to update Compliance Tasks
invalid_issue_start_date.message: Start date selected succeeds the due date for some Compliance Tasks. Ensure start date to be before the due date.

invalid_issue_target_date.title: Unable to update Compliance Tasks
invalid_issue_target_date.message: Due date selected precedes the start date for some Compliance Tasks. Ensure due date to be after the start date.

invalid_state_transition.title: Unable to update Compliance Tasks
invalid_state_transition.message: State change is not allowed for some Compliance Tasks. Ensure the state change is allowed.

settings.heading: Recurring Compliance Tasks
settings.description: Set your repeatable work once, and we’ll take care of the repeats. You’ll see everything right here when it’s time.

create_button.label: Create recurring Compliance Task
create_button.no_permission: Contact your IPO Workspace admin to create recurring Compliance Tasks

upgrade.title: Compliance Tasks, on autopilot
upgrade.description: Set it once. We’ll bring it back when it’s due. Upgrade to Business to make recurring work feel effortless.

no_templates.button: Create your first recurring Compliance Task

success.title: Recurring Compliance Task created
success.message: {name}, the recurring Compliance Task, is now available for your workspace.

error.title: We couldn't create that recurring Compliance Task this time.
error.message: Try saving your details again or copy them over to a new recurring Compliance Task, preferably in another tab.

success.title: Recurring Compliance Task changed
success.message: {name}, the recurring Compliance Task, was changed.

error.title: We couldn't save changes to this recurring Compliance Task.
error.message: Try saving your details again or come back to this recurring Compliance Task later. If there's trouble still, reach out to us.

success.title: Recurring Compliance Task deleted
success.message: {name}, the recurring Compliance Task, has now been deleted from your workspace.

error.title: We couldn't delete that recurring Compliance Task this.
error.message: Try deleting it again or come back to it later. If you can't delete it then, reach out to us.

description.prefix: Are you sure you want to delete recurring Compliance Task-
description.suffix: ? All of the data related to the recurring Compliance Task will be permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.
